---
title: "Logging in"
---

### Accessing katana

- You will need to get a little familiar with using a terminal.
- You can access katana using SSH (Secure SHell) from your local machine.

### Mac

Open up Terminal and SSH into katana:

![](../screenshots/terminal_login.png)

### Windows

First you will need to download a SSH client such as

![](../screenshots/putty.png)

### Welcome message

If you are successful you will see the following

![](../screenshots/katana_welcome.png)
